name: Open Orbit Dots
css: .darma-loader-open-orbit-dots{position:relative;display:inline-block;width:64px;height:64px;animation:darma-loader-open-orbit-dots-spin var(--loader-speed,1.1s) linear infinite}.darma-loader-open-orbit-dots i{position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;width:12px;height:12px;margin:-6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--loader-color,#6366f1);box-shadow:0 0 18px color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#6366f1) 55%,transparent)}.darma-loader-open-orbit-dots i:nth-child(1){transform:rotate(0deg) translateX(25px)}.darma-loader-open-orbit-dots i:nth-child(2){transform:rotate(120deg) translateX(25px);background:var(--loader-secondary-color,#22c55e)}.darma-loader-open-orbit-dots i:nth-child(3){transform:rotate(240deg) translateX(25px);opacity:.72}@keyframes darma-loader-open-orbit-dots-spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}

source.name: loading.io CSS loader pattern
source.author: loading.io
source.license: CC0/free CSS pattern, normalized by Darma
